title: Environment situation (Jan 2023 housing-pivot — the fellas aren't the elevation circle)
html:
TL;DR

  • Jan 31, 2023 — Yahir's OSU inner circle ("the core fellas") wants to townhouse together for next year, possibly with Luek and Henry.
  • Yahir admits the inevitable he's been avoiding: "this is not an environment, with these fellas, that I can maximize my potential." They're great primary friends but not the circle that elevates him.
  • Generates a "next-in-line" roster — and immediately self-disqualifies every name: Marc, Kyle, Gabe Puerto Rico, Cade Buchanon, Ashwin, Peter Layzell, Nicolas Rist (the asterisked one).
  • Closes with: "I am failing really hard in the social-circle aspect of my life… this puts it into perspective….."
  • This is the first explicit dated articulation of the social-environment-as-ceiling thesis Yahir later acts on — rebooted in the 2025 Austin move.

Why this matters for the graph

  • The environment situation arc — Yahir periodically re-litigating "who am I in proximity to and is it raising or lowering me" — has its dated origin point here. Three months earlier, the "fellas" doc was about romantic peer-pressure inside the same group. This one is about ditching the group entirely.
  • The disqualified-roster structure is itself diagnostic: Yahir lists 7 alternatives and dismisses all of them in the same breath. The honest read is "there is no in-Corvallis answer."
  • Sets up the Sep 2023 obscurity monologue (8 months later, same texture: "sharing what I do feels inferior and sheepish") and ultimately the move out of Oregon decision.

Mentioned this round (queued, not stubbed)

  • Luek — possible OSU friend, single mention, "the core fellas" extended ring. Queue.
  • Marc / Kyle (likely kyle nguyen or kyle?) / Gabe Puerto Rico / Cade Buchanon / Ashwin / Peter Layzell / Nicolas Rist — disqualified-roster, all single mention in this slice. Queue all to log.
